cross_scene_arcs.title: Return to Leadership with Full Autonomy
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: McGinty transitions from retirement to full control of the team, securing authority over player decisions and ultimately rejecting the return of striking players to preserve the identity of the replacement roster.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Retired coach persuaded to return with full autonomy
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Institutionalized as the decisive leader who reshapes team identity against league norms
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Legitimacy of the replacement team under league and union scrutiny

cross_scene_arcs.title: Mentorship and Redemption of Shane Falco
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: McGinty recruits, develops, and emotionally challenges Shane Falco, guiding him from self-doubt to leadership before withdrawing approval after a harmful play, then ultimately affirming him as the team's on-field leader.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Shane is a broken, retired quarterback afraid of failure
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Shane is recognized as the team's leader, entrusted with the final play decision
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Shane can regain McGinty's full personal trust after the injury incident

cross_scene_arcs.title: Building a Team of Misfits and Second Chances
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: McGinty assembles a team of overlooked and discarded players, prioritizing heart and entertainment over conventional talent, culminating in the formal recognition of the replacement roster as the official team.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Team construction begins with unconventional recruits and a veteran seeking one last play
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: The replacement team is celebrated as the legitimate Redskins roster
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Long-term acceptance of the 'Scabskins' as a legitimate NFL team

cross_scene_arcs.title: Tactical Innovation and In-Game Leadership
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: McGinty adapts the offensive strategy to protect and empower Shane, maintains composure during crisis, and makes decisive in-game interventions to secure victory and player accountability.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Shane struggles as a traditional passer under pressure
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: McGinty's tactical and motivational decisions lead to a game-winning play and full player ownership of the outcome
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Effectiveness of the rollout strategy against elite defenses in future games

cross_scene_arcs.title: Leadership Transition and Delegation to McGinty
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: O'Neil moves from firing Tildon to securing McGinty as head coach, then defers to his judgment on team decisions, establishing a functional coaching partnership built on negotiated autonomy.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: O'Neil asserts control through authoritarian dismissal of Tildon.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: O'Neil accepts McGinty's quarterback choice and collaborates on team oversight while retaining strategic influence.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Tension remains over how much O'Neil will truly refrain from interfering.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Defiance of NFL Authority and Post-Strike Vision
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: O'Neil shifts from negotiating McGinty's return under strike conditions to outright rejecting union agreements, defying the NFL by planning to keep replacement players and demanding a win despite consequences.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: O'Neil works within the strike framework to build a replacement team.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: O'Neil openly violates league norms, risking stadium closure to assert his independence.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The NFL may retaliate by closing the stadium, threatening the team's future.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Emotional and Physical Arc Through the Season's Climax
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: O'Neil deteriorates under stress during early game failures, disengages in despair, but is emotionally revived by the team's late success, culminating in physical and emotional release during the final victory.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: O'Neil is overwhelmed and orders the game turned off to protect his health.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: He is physically supported but emotionally rejuvenated, sharing affection and celebration after the win.

cross_scene_arcs.title: O'Neil's Evolving Relationship with Augustine Ripley
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: O'Neil's dependency on Augustine evolves from observed care during moments of agitation to shared joy and confirmed affection, revealing a deepening personal bond.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Augustine assists O'Neil with oxygen, maintaining a caretaker role.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: They share a kiss after the game, indicating a mutual and acknowledged emotional connection.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Return from Exile and Reclamation of Identity
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Shane moves from emotional disengagement in exile to reclaiming his identity as a quarterback, progressing from hesitation and unpreparedness to delivering a decisive game-winning performance.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: emotionally tied to past football glory
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: recognized as team leader who delivered under pressure

cross_scene_arcs.title: Confronting Fear and Building Resilience
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Shane repeatedly faces internal and external threats to his confidence and safety, including anxiety, intimidation, and self-doubt, gradually building resilience through mentorship and personal revelation.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: resisting return due to fear of failure
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: physically injured but determined and composed under pressure
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: fear of failure and belief in personal unworthiness persist beneath the surface

cross_scene_arcs.title: Evolving Relationship with Annabelle
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Shane's relationship with Annabelle evolves from resistance and self-sabotage to emotional openness and quiet mutual recognition, despite external threats and his initial desire to be victimized.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: resistant to protection, hoping to be exploited
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: shares a quiet, meaningful moment of connection after victory
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: relationship remains under strain due to external intimidation

cross_scene_arcs.title: Establishing Leadership Amid Team Turmoil
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Shane transitions from being a targeted outsider to an emergent and then affirmed team leader, earning trust through vulnerability, authority, and decisive action despite initial hostility and isolation.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: socially isolated but guarded by Jamal and Andre
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: recognized as team leader who delivered game-winning play call
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: still needs to prove his leadership and commitment on the field
